nodes.label: Ester Sound Event Map
nodes.rationale: Sound design direction: no music, short underwater SFX, soft UI Foley, low-volume looping ambience. Prefer CC0 license. Sounds should feel cohesive with muffled water, bubbles, shell clicks, gentle currents, low filtered rumbles. Minigames avoid musical chimes and use physical effects only. Repeated hooks throttled in GameAudio.

nodes.label: GameAudio System
nodes.rationale: Handles audio playback throttling and player pools for simultaneous playback. Referenced in SOUND_MAP.md as the system that prevents audio spam from repeated hooks.

nodes.label: Ambient Audio Depth Layers
nodes.rationale: Six ambient layers map to water depth zones: clear/surface, shallow/reef, mid/blue, deep, abyss, and refuge. Each has a distinct sonic character (bright/airy → low pressure → dark hum → safe shimmer).
